form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 5 m finishing fourth behind Royal Comet at Pocono Downs over 1609m in a W4-7PM on March 21 at $18.20. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Ma Isabelle at this track over 1609m in a JBTS?L2 on April 8 at $4.85. Nice effort last time. Big chance.
